sections.paragraph:
& יֹתֵר-

(1) pr. part of the root יָתַר: remainder, hence gain, emolument. Ecc 6:8.

(2) Adv.-(a) more, farther. (Chald. and Rabb. יֹותֵר [“Syr. ܝܬܰܝܺܪ”], followed by מִן more than), Ecc 2:15 7:11 12:12 .-(b) too much, over. Ecc 7:16.-(c) besides, like יֶתֶר Est 6:6 יֹותֵד מִמֶּנִּי besides me. יֹותֵר שֶׁ· conj. inasmuch as. Ecc 12:9 וְיֹותֵר שֶׁהָיָה קֹהֶלֶת חָכָם “and inasmuch as Koheleth was wise.”
